WITH top_school AS (SELECT cds FROM satscores WHERE numge1500 >= 1500 ORDER BY numge1500 DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT COALESCE(s.admfname1, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(s.admlname1, '') AS administrator_name FROM top_school AS ts JOIN schools AS s ON ts.cds = s.cdscode WHERE NOT s.admfname1 IS NULL AND s.admfname1 <> '' UNION ALL SELECT COALESCE(s.admfname2, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(s.admlname2, '') AS administrator_name FROM top_school AS ts JOIN schools AS s ON ts.cds = s.cdscode WHERE NOT s.admfname2 IS NULL AND s.admfname2 <> '' UNION ALL SELECT COALESCE(s.admfname3, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(s.admlname3, '') AS administrator_name FROM top_school AS ts JOIN schools AS s ON ts.cds = s.cdscode WHERE NOT s.admfname3 IS NULL AND s.admfname3 <> ''

SELECT CAST((SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(y.date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN y.consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(y.date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN y.consumption ELSE 0 END)) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(y.date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN y.consumption ELSE 0 END) AS decrease_rate FROM transactions_1k AS t INNER JOIN yearmonth AS y ON t.customerid = y.customerid WHERE t.price = 634.8 AND t.date = '2012-08-25'

SELECT CAST((MAX(CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(ym.`Date`, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN ym.`Consumption` ELSE 0 END) - MAX(CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(ym.`Date`, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN ym.`Consumption` ELSE 0 END)) AS REAL) / MAX(CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(ym.`Date`, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN ym.`Consumption` ELSE 1 END) AS decrease_rate FROM `transactions_1k` AS t JOIN `yearmonth` AS ym ON t.`CustomerID` = ym.`CustomerID` WHERE t.`Date` = '2012-08-25' AND SUBSTRING(ym.`Date`, 1, 4) IN ('2012', '2013') GROUP BY t.`CustomerID`

WITH customer_transaction AS (SELECT DISTINCT t.`CustomerID` FROM `transactions_1k` AS t WHERE t.`Date` = '2012-08-25'), consumption_2012 AS (SELECT ym.`Consumption` AS cons_2012 FROM `yearmonth` AS ym INNER JOIN customer_transaction AS ct ON ym.`CustomerID` = ct.`CustomerID` WHERE SUBSTRING(ym.`Date`, 1, 4) = '2012'), consumption_2013 AS (SELECT ym.`Consumption` AS cons_2013 FROM `yearmonth` AS ym INNER JOIN customer_transaction AS ct ON ym.`CustomerID` = ct.`CustomerID` WHERE SUBSTRING(ym.`Date`, 1, 4) = '2013') SELECT (c2.cons_2012 - c3.cons_2013) / c2.cons_2012 AS consumption_decrease_rate FROM consumption_2012 AS c2 CROSS JOIN consumption_2013 AS c3 WHERE NOT c2.cons_2012 IS NULL AND NOT c3.cons_2013 IS NULL LIMIT 1

SELECT ((t2012.total_consumption_2012 - t2013.total_consumption_2013) * 1.0 / t2012.total_consumption_2012) AS consumption_decrease_rate FROM (SELECT customerid, SUM(consumption) AS total_consumption_2012 FROM yearmonth WHERE date LIKE '2012%' GROUP BY customerid) AS t2012 JOIN (SELECT customerid, SUM(consumption) AS total_consumption_2013 FROM yearmonth WHERE date LIKE '2013%' GROUP BY customerid) AS t2013 ON t2012.customerid = t2013.customerid
